[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100110011 5
1 010000011 3
2 010010101 4
3 100011101 5
4 010110011 5
5 100100110 4
6 001001111 5
7 000010100 2

67 76 110011111 7
70 07 110110000 4

13 31 010110011 5 match 4
24 42 100100110 4 match 5
35 53 001001111 5 match 6
46 64 000010100 2 match 7
